content:
# Best AI Audio Tools for Remixing in 2026

Creating great remixes used to require expensive studio equipment and years of training. AI tools make professional remixing accessible to everyone!

Check out our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more AI tools.

---

## Suno: AI Music Creation

Suno can generate original music in any style, perfect for remixing.

### Suno for Remixing
- **Style transfer**: Transform songs into new genres
- **Original stems**: Create from scratch for remixing
- **Custom vocals**: Generate unique vocal performances

**Try Suno**: https://suno.ai

---

## [[link:/tools/79|Descript]]: Audio Stem Editing

[[link:/tools/79|Descript]] makes editing audio as easy as editing text.

### Descript for Remixing
- **Text-based editing**: Edit audio by editing text
- **Stem separation**: Isolate vocals and instruments
- **Multi-track editing**: Combine sources easily

**Try Descript**: https://descript.com

---
